message:
test(cross_pane_correlation): add telemetry counter tests [ft-3kxe.26]

- Add 10 inline unit tests for CorrelationEngine telemetry:
  initial zero, ingest counted, batch counted, prune counted,
  scan counted, correlations found, multiple operations,
  serde roundtrip, prune no-removal still counted
- Add 7 proptest invariants: ingest equals count, batch equals count,
  prunes equals call count, scans equals call count,
  pruned <= ingested, serde roundtrip, monotonic counters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
